name: refrain
description: Restrained local-first product style, agent runtime contracts, and review skills.

interface.shortDescription: Restrained product style and local-first agent runtime defaults.
interface.longDescription: Refrain packages reusable Agent Skills for building quiet, local-first product tools with auditable Agent CLI runtime behavior, deterministic quality gates, and strict verification habits.
defaultPrompt: Apply Refrain style to this product shell.
Review this app against Refrain's quality bar.
